built with pdoc

deepxube.pathfinding.supervised 

  1from typing import List, Any, Optional, Type, Tuple
  2from deepxube.base.domain import Action, NodesSupervisable, EdgesSupervisable, EdgesSampleable
  3from deepxube.base.pathfinding import Instance, InstanceNode, InstanceEdge, Node, EdgeQ, PathFindNode, PathFindEdge, PathFindSup
  4from deepxube.factories.pathfinding_factory import pathfinding_factory
  5import time
  6
  7
  8class InstanceSup(Instance):
  9    def frontier_size(self) -> int:
 10        raise NotImplementedError
 11
 12    def record_goal(self, nodes: List[Node]) -> None:
 13        raise NotImplementedError
 14
 15    def finished(self) -> bool:
 16        return self.itr > 0
 17
 18
 19class InstanceNodeSup(InstanceNode, InstanceSup):
 20    def __init__(self, root_node: Node, path_cost_sup: float, inst_info: Any):
 21        super().__init__(root_node, inst_info)
 22        self.path_cost_sup: float = path_cost_sup
 23
 24    def filter_expanded_nodes(self, nodes: List[Node]) -> List[Node]:
 25        raise NotImplementedError
 26
 27    def push_pop_nodes(self, nodes: List[Node], costs: List[float]) -> List[Node]:
 28        raise NotImplementedError
 29
 30
 31class InstanceEdgeSup(InstanceEdge, InstanceSup):
 32    def __init__(self, root_node: Node, action: Action, path_cost_sup: float, inst_info: Any):
 33        super().__init__(root_node, inst_info)
 34        self.action: Action = action
 35        self.path_cost_sup: float = path_cost_sup
 36
 37    def filter_popped_nodes(self, nodes: List[Node]) -> List[Node]:
 38        raise NotImplementedError
 39
 40    def push_pop_edges(self, edges: List[EdgeQ], costs: List[float]) -> List[EdgeQ]:
 41        raise NotImplementedError
 42
 43
 44@pathfinding_factory.register_class("sup_v")
 45class PathFindNodeSup(PathFindNode[NodesSupervisable, Any, InstanceNodeSup], PathFindSup[NodesSupervisable, InstanceNodeSup]):
 46    @staticmethod
 47    def domain_type() -> Type[NodesSupervisable]:
 48        return NodesSupervisable
 49
 50    def step(self, verbose: bool = False) -> Tuple[List[Node], List[EdgeQ]]:
 51        nodes: List[Node] = []
 52        for instance in self.instances:
 53            node_root: Node = instance.root_node
 54            node_root.heuristic = instance.path_cost_sup
 55            node_root.backup_val = instance.path_cost_sup
 56            nodes.append(node_root)
 57            instance.add_nodes_popped([node_root])
 58            instance.itr += 1
 59        start_time = time.time()
 60        # self.set_is_solved(nodes)
 61        self.times.record_time("is_solved", time.time() - start_time)
 62
 63        return nodes, []
 64
 65    def _compute_costs(self, instances: List[InstanceNodeSup], nodes_by_inst: List[List[Node]]) -> List[List[float]]:
 66        raise NotImplementedError
 67
 68    def make_instances_sup(self, steps_gen: List[int], inst_infos: Optional[List[Any]]) -> List[InstanceNodeSup]:
 69        # get nodes and labels
 70        start_time = time.time()
 71        states_start, goals, labels = self.domain.samp_nodes_and_labels(steps_gen)
 72        self.times.record_time("get_sup", time.time() - start_time)
 73
 74        # make instances
 75        nodes_root: List[Node] = self._create_root_nodes(states_start, goals, False)
 76
 77        start_time = time.time()
 78        if inst_infos is None:
 79            inst_infos = [None for _ in states_start]
 80
 81        instances: List[InstanceNodeSup] = []
 82        for node_root, label, inst_info in zip(nodes_root, labels, inst_infos):
 83            instances.append(InstanceNodeSup(node_root, label, inst_info))
 84        self.times.record_time("instances", time.time() - start_time)
 85
 86        return instances
 87
 88
 89@pathfinding_factory.register_class("sup_q")
 90class PathFindEdgeSup(PathFindEdge[EdgesSupervisable, Any, InstanceEdgeSup], PathFindSup[EdgesSupervisable, InstanceEdgeSup]):
 91    @staticmethod
 92    def domain_type() -> Type[EdgesSupervisable]:
 93        return EdgesSupervisable
 94
 95    def step(self, verbose: bool = False) -> Tuple[List[Node], List[EdgeQ]]:
 96        edges: List[EdgeQ] = []
 97        for instance in self.instances:
 98            node_root: Node = instance.root_node
 99            edge: EdgeQ = EdgeQ(node_root, instance.action, instance.path_cost_sup)
100            edges.append(edge)
101            node_root.backup_val = instance.path_cost_sup
102            instance.itr += 1
103            instance.add_edges_popped([edge])
104        start_time = time.time()
105        # self.set_is_solved([edge.node for edge in edges])
106        self.times.record_time("is_solved", time.time() - start_time)
107
108        return [], edges
109
110    def _compute_costs(self, instances: List[InstanceEdgeSup], edges_by_inst: List[List[EdgeQ]]) -> List[List[float]]:
111        raise NotImplementedError
112
113    def make_instances_sup(self, steps_gen: List[int], inst_infos: Optional[List[Any]]) -> List[InstanceEdgeSup]:
114        # get edges and labels
115        start_time = time.time()
116        states_start, goals, actions_init, labels = self.domain.samp_edges_and_labels(steps_gen)
117        self.times.record_time("get_sup", time.time() - start_time)
118
119        # make root nodes
120        nodes_root: List[Node] = self._create_root_nodes(states_start, goals, False)
121
122        # make instances
123        start_time = time.time()
124        if inst_infos is None:
125            inst_infos = [None for _ in states_start]
126
127        instances: List[InstanceEdgeSup] = []
128        for node_root, action_init, label, inst_info in zip(nodes_root, actions_init, labels, inst_infos, strict=True):
129            instances.append(InstanceEdgeSup(node_root, action_init, label, inst_info))
130        self.times.record_time("instances", time.time() - start_time)
131
132        return instances
133
134
135@pathfinding_factory.register_class("sup_p")
136class PathFindEdgeSamp(PathFindEdge[EdgesSampleable, Any, InstanceEdgeSup], PathFindSup[EdgesSampleable, InstanceEdgeSup]):
137    @staticmethod
138    def domain_type() -> Type[EdgesSampleable]:
139        return EdgesSampleable
140
141    def step(self, verbose: bool = False) -> Tuple[List[Node], List[EdgeQ]]:
142        edges: List[EdgeQ] = []
143        for instance in self.instances:
144            node_root: Node = instance.root_node
145            edge: EdgeQ = EdgeQ(node_root, instance.action, instance.path_cost_sup)
146            edges.append(edge)
147            node_root.backup_val = instance.path_cost_sup
148            instance.itr += 1
149            instance.add_edges_popped([edge])
150        start_time = time.time()
151        self.times.record_time("is_solved", time.time() - start_time)
152
153        return [], edges
154
155    def _compute_costs(self, instances: List[InstanceEdgeSup], edges_by_inst: List[List[EdgeQ]]) -> List[List[float]]:
156        raise NotImplementedError
157
158    def make_instances_sup(self, steps_gen: List[int], inst_infos: Optional[List[Any]]) -> List[InstanceEdgeSup]:
159        # get edges and labels
160        start_time = time.time()
161        states_start, goals, actions_init = self.domain.samp_edges(steps_gen)
162        self.times.record_time("get_sup", time.time() - start_time)
163
164        # make root nodes
165        nodes_root: List[Node] = self._create_root_nodes(states_start, goals, False)
166
167        # make instances
168        start_time = time.time()
169        if inst_infos is None:
170            inst_infos = [None for _ in states_start]
171
172        instances: List[InstanceEdgeSup] = []
173        for node_root, action_init, inst_info in zip(nodes_root, actions_init, inst_infos, strict=True):
174            instances.append(InstanceEdgeSup(node_root, action_init, 0.0, inst_info))
175        self.times.record_time("instances", time.time() - start_time)
176
177        return instances
class InstanceSup(deepxube.base.pathfinding.Instance): 
 9class InstanceSup(Instance):
10    def frontier_size(self) -> int:
11        raise NotImplementedError
12
13    def record_goal(self, nodes: List[Node]) -> None:
14        raise NotImplementedError
15
16    def finished(self) -> bool:
17        return self.itr > 0

Helper class that provides a standard way to create an ABC using inheritance.

def frontier_size(self) -> int: 
10    def frontier_size(self) -> int:
11        raise NotImplementedError
def record_goal(self, nodes: List[deepxube.base.pathfinding.Node]) -> None: 
13    def record_goal(self, nodes: List[Node]) -> None:
14        raise NotImplementedError
def finished(self) -> bool: 
16    def finished(self) -> bool:
17        return self.itr > 0

@pathfinding_factory.register_class('sup_v')
class PathFindNodeSup(deepxube.base.pathfinding.PathFindNode[deepxube.base.domain.NodesSupervisable, typing.Any, deepxube.pathfinding.supervised.InstanceNodeSup], deepxube.base.pathfinding.PathFindSup[deepxube.base.domain.NodesSupervisable, deepxube.pathfinding.supervised.InstanceNodeSup]): 
45@pathfinding_factory.register_class("sup_v")
46class PathFindNodeSup(PathFindNode[NodesSupervisable, Any, InstanceNodeSup], PathFindSup[NodesSupervisable, InstanceNodeSup]):
47    @staticmethod
48    def domain_type() -> Type[NodesSupervisable]:
49        return NodesSupervisable
50
51    def step(self, verbose: bool = False) -> Tuple[List[Node], List[EdgeQ]]:
52        nodes: List[Node] = []
53        for instance in self.instances:
54            node_root: Node = instance.root_node
55            node_root.heuristic = instance.path_cost_sup
56            node_root.backup_val = instance.path_cost_sup
57            nodes.append(node_root)
58            instance.add_nodes_popped([node_root])
59            instance.itr += 1
60        start_time = time.time()
61        # self.set_is_solved(nodes)
62        self.times.record_time("is_solved", time.time() - start_time)
63
64        return nodes, []
65
66    def _compute_costs(self, instances: List[InstanceNodeSup], nodes_by_inst: List[List[Node]]) -> List[List[float]]:
67        raise NotImplementedError
68
69    def make_instances_sup(self, steps_gen: List[int], inst_infos: Optional[List[Any]]) -> List[InstanceNodeSup]:
70        # get nodes and labels
71        start_time = time.time()
72        states_start, goals, labels = self.domain.samp_nodes_and_labels(steps_gen)
73        self.times.record_time("get_sup", time.time() - start_time)
74
75        # make instances
76        nodes_root: List[Node] = self._create_root_nodes(states_start, goals, False)
77
78        start_time = time.time()
79        if inst_infos is None:
80            inst_infos = [None for _ in states_start]
81
82        instances: List[InstanceNodeSup] = []
83        for node_root, label, inst_info in zip(nodes_root, labels, inst_infos):
84            instances.append(InstanceNodeSup(node_root, label, inst_info))
85        self.times.record_time("instances", time.time() - start_time)
86
87        return instances

Use the path cost of a random walk as the learning target. See Chervov, Alexander, et al. "A Machine Learning Approach That Beats Large Rubik's Cubes." NeurIPS(2025).

@staticmethod
def domain_type() -> Type[deepxube.base.domain.NodesSupervisable]: 
47    @staticmethod
48    def domain_type() -> Type[NodesSupervisable]:
49        return NodesSupervisable
def step( self, verbose: bool = False) -> Tuple[List[deepxube.base.pathfinding.Node], List[deepxube.base.pathfinding.EdgeQ]]: 
51    def step(self, verbose: bool = False) -> Tuple[List[Node], List[EdgeQ]]:
52        nodes: List[Node] = []
53        for instance in self.instances:
54            node_root: Node = instance.root_node
55            node_root.heuristic = instance.path_cost_sup
56            node_root.backup_val = instance.path_cost_sup
57            nodes.append(node_root)
58            instance.add_nodes_popped([node_root])
59            instance.itr += 1
60        start_time = time.time()
61        # self.set_is_solved(nodes)
62        self.times.record_time("is_solved", time.time() - start_time)
63
64        return nodes, []
def make_instances_sup( self, steps_gen: List[int], inst_infos: Optional[List[Any]]) -> List[InstanceNodeSup]: 
69    def make_instances_sup(self, steps_gen: List[int], inst_infos: Optional[List[Any]]) -> List[InstanceNodeSup]:
70        # get nodes and labels
71        start_time = time.time()
72        states_start, goals, labels = self.domain.samp_nodes_and_labels(steps_gen)
73        self.times.record_time("get_sup", time.time() - start_time)
74
75        # make instances
76        nodes_root: List[Node] = self._create_root_nodes(states_start, goals, False)
77
78        start_time = time.time()
79        if inst_infos is None:
80            inst_infos = [None for _ in states_start]
81
82        instances: List[InstanceNodeSup] = []
83        for node_root, label, inst_info in zip(nodes_root, labels, inst_infos):
84            instances.append(InstanceNodeSup(node_root, label, inst_info))
85        self.times.record_time("instances", time.time() - start_time)
86
87        return instances

@pathfinding_factory.register_class('sup_q')
class PathFindEdgeSup(deepxube.base.pathfinding.PathFindEdge[deepxube.base.domain.EdgesSupervisable, typing.Any, deepxube.pathfinding.supervised.InstanceEdgeSup], deepxube.base.pathfinding.PathFindSup[deepxube.base.domain.EdgesSupervisable, deepxube.pathfinding.supervised.InstanceEdgeSup]): 
 90@pathfinding_factory.register_class("sup_q")
 91class PathFindEdgeSup(PathFindEdge[EdgesSupervisable, Any, InstanceEdgeSup], PathFindSup[EdgesSupervisable, InstanceEdgeSup]):
 92    @staticmethod
 93    def domain_type() -> Type[EdgesSupervisable]:
 94        return EdgesSupervisable
 95
 96    def step(self, verbose: bool = False) -> Tuple[List[Node], List[EdgeQ]]:
 97        edges: List[EdgeQ] = []
 98        for instance in self.instances:
 99            node_root: Node = instance.root_node
100            edge: EdgeQ = EdgeQ(node_root, instance.action, instance.path_cost_sup)
101            edges.append(edge)
102            node_root.backup_val = instance.path_cost_sup
103            instance.itr += 1
104            instance.add_edges_popped([edge])
105        start_time = time.time()
106        # self.set_is_solved([edge.node for edge in edges])
107        self.times.record_time("is_solved", time.time() - start_time)
108
109        return [], edges
110
111    def _compute_costs(self, instances: List[InstanceEdgeSup], edges_by_inst: List[List[EdgeQ]]) -> List[List[float]]:
112        raise NotImplementedError
113
114    def make_instances_sup(self, steps_gen: List[int], inst_infos: Optional[List[Any]]) -> List[InstanceEdgeSup]:
115        # get edges and labels
116        start_time = time.time()
117        states_start, goals, actions_init, labels = self.domain.samp_edges_and_labels(steps_gen)
118        self.times.record_time("get_sup", time.time() - start_time)
119
120        # make root nodes
121        nodes_root: List[Node] = self._create_root_nodes(states_start, goals, False)
122
123        # make instances
124        start_time = time.time()
125        if inst_infos is None:
126            inst_infos = [None for _ in states_start]
127
128        instances: List[InstanceEdgeSup] = []
129        for node_root, action_init, label, inst_info in zip(nodes_root, actions_init, labels, inst_infos, strict=True):
130            instances.append(InstanceEdgeSup(node_root, action_init, label, inst_info))
131        self.times.record_time("instances", time.time() - start_time)
132
133        return instances

Use the path cost of a random walk as the learning target. See Chervov, Alexander, et al. "A Machine Learning Approach That Beats Large Rubik's Cubes." NeurIPS(2025).

@staticmethod
def domain_type() -> Type[deepxube.base.domain.EdgesSupervisable]: 
92    @staticmethod
93    def domain_type() -> Type[EdgesSupervisable]:
94        return EdgesSupervisable
def step( self, verbose: bool = False) -> Tuple[List[deepxube.base.pathfinding.Node], List[deepxube.base.pathfinding.EdgeQ]]: 
 96    def step(self, verbose: bool = False) -> Tuple[List[Node], List[EdgeQ]]:
 97        edges: List[EdgeQ] = []
 98        for instance in self.instances:
 99            node_root: Node = instance.root_node
100            edge: EdgeQ = EdgeQ(node_root, instance.action, instance.path_cost_sup)
101            edges.append(edge)
102            node_root.backup_val = instance.path_cost_sup
103            instance.itr += 1
104            instance.add_edges_popped([edge])
105        start_time = time.time()
106        # self.set_is_solved([edge.node for edge in edges])
107        self.times.record_time("is_solved", time.time() - start_time)
108

def make_instances_sup( self, steps_gen: List[int], inst_infos: Optional[List[Any]]) -> List[InstanceEdgeSup]: 
114    def make_instances_sup(self, steps_gen: List[int], inst_infos: Optional[List[Any]]) -> List[InstanceEdgeSup]:
115        # get edges and labels
116        start_time = time.time()
117        states_start, goals, actions_init, labels = self.domain.samp_edges_and_labels(steps_gen)
118        self.times.record_time("get_sup", time.time() - start_time)
119
120        # make root nodes
121        nodes_root: List[Node] = self._create_root_nodes(states_start, goals, False)
122
123        # make instances
124        start_time = time.time()
125        if inst_infos is None:
126            inst_infos = [None for _ in states_start]
127
128        instances: List[InstanceEdgeSup] = []
129        for node_root, action_init, label, inst_info in zip(nodes_root, actions_init, labels, inst_infos, strict=True):
130            instances.append(InstanceEdgeSup(node_root, action_init, label, inst_info))
131        self.times.record_time("instances", time.time() - start_time)
132
133        return instances

@pathfinding_factory.register_class('sup_p')
class PathFindEdgeSamp(deepxube.base.pathfinding.PathFindEdge[deepxube.base.domain.EdgesSampleable, typing.Any, deepxube.pathfinding.supervised.InstanceEdgeSup], deepxube.base.pathfinding.PathFindSup[deepxube.base.domain.EdgesSampleable, deepxube.pathfinding.supervised.InstanceEdgeSup]): 
136@pathfinding_factory.register_class("sup_p")
137class PathFindEdgeSamp(PathFindEdge[EdgesSampleable, Any, InstanceEdgeSup], PathFindSup[EdgesSampleable, InstanceEdgeSup]):
138    @staticmethod
139    def domain_type() -> Type[EdgesSampleable]:
140        return EdgesSampleable
141
142    def step(self, verbose: bool = False) -> Tuple[List[Node], List[EdgeQ]]:
143        edges: List[EdgeQ] = []
144        for instance in self.instances:
145            node_root: Node = instance.root_node
146            edge: EdgeQ = EdgeQ(node_root, instance.action, instance.path_cost_sup)
147            edges.append(edge)
148            node_root.backup_val = instance.path_cost_sup
149            instance.itr += 1
150            instance.add_edges_popped([edge])
151        start_time = time.time()
152        self.times.record_time("is_solved", time.time() - start_time)
153
154        return [], edges
155
156    def _compute_costs(self, instances: List[InstanceEdgeSup], edges_by_inst: List[List[EdgeQ]]) -> List[List[float]]:
157        raise NotImplementedError
158
159    def make_instances_sup(self, steps_gen: List[int], inst_infos: Optional[List[Any]]) -> List[InstanceEdgeSup]:
160        # get edges and labels
161        start_time = time.time()
162        states_start, goals, actions_init = self.domain.samp_edges(steps_gen)
163        self.times.record_time("get_sup", time.time() - start_time)
164
165        # make root nodes
166        nodes_root: List[Node] = self._create_root_nodes(states_start, goals, False)
167
168        # make instances
169        start_time = time.time()
170        if inst_infos is None:
171            inst_infos = [None for _ in states_start]
172
173        instances: List[InstanceEdgeSup] = []
174        for node_root, action_init, inst_info in zip(nodes_root, actions_init, inst_infos, strict=True):
175            instances.append(InstanceEdgeSup(node_root, action_init, 0.0, inst_info))
176        self.times.record_time("instances", time.time() - start_time)
177
178        return instances

Use the path cost of a random walk as the learning target. See Chervov, Alexander, et al. "A Machine Learning Approach That Beats Large Rubik's Cubes." NeurIPS(2025).

@staticmethod
def domain_type() -> Type[deepxube.base.domain.EdgesSampleable]: 
138    @staticmethod
139    def domain_type() -> Type[EdgesSampleable]:
140        return EdgesSampleable
def step( self, verbose: bool = False) -> Tuple[List[deepxube.base.pathfinding.Node], List[deepxube.base.pathfinding.EdgeQ]]: 
142    def step(self, verbose: bool = False) -> Tuple[List[Node], List[EdgeQ]]:
143        edges: List[EdgeQ] = []
144        for instance in self.instances:
145            node_root: Node = instance.root_node
146            edge: EdgeQ = EdgeQ(node_root, instance.action, instance.path_cost_sup)
147            edges.append(edge)
148            node_root.backup_val = instance.path_cost_sup
149            instance.itr += 1
150            instance.add_edges_popped([edge])
151        start_time = time.time()
152        self.times.record_time("is_solved", time.time() - start_time)
153
154        return [], edges
def make_instances_sup( self, steps_gen: List[int], inst_infos: Optional[List[Any]]) -> List[InstanceEdgeSup]: 
159    def make_instances_sup(self, steps_gen: List[int], inst_infos: Optional[List[Any]]) -> List[InstanceEdgeSup]:
160        # get edges and labels
161        start_time = time.time()
162        states_start, goals, actions_init = self.domain.samp_edges(steps_gen)
163        self.times.record_time("get_sup", time.time() - start_time)
164
165        # make root nodes
166        nodes_root: List[Node] = self._create_root_nodes(states_start, goals, False)
167
168        # make instances
169        start_time = time.time()
170        if inst_infos is None:
171            inst_infos = [None for _ in states_start]
172
173        instances: List[InstanceEdgeSup] = []
174        for node_root, action_init, inst_info in zip(nodes_root, actions_init, inst_infos, strict=True):
175            instances.append(InstanceEdgeSup(node_root, action_init, 0.0, inst_info))
176        self.times.record_time("instances", time.time() - start_time)
177
178        return instances

Make nodes/edges with labels
